name: Beijing Telesound Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Telesound Electronics Co., Ltd. provides security and protection systems in China. The company offers city, and subway security and protection image information management systems; remote monitoring solutions for city dangerous fountain, bank coffers, schools, substations, machine rooms oil fields, road monitoring, local office building, etc.; system solutions for bank ATM network operation and maintenance; bank network monitoring and alarming management solutions; security and protection, and information management solutions for national storage; and cultural heritage image information management solutions for state administration of cultural heritage. Its products are used in the fields of government, finance, police, army, judicature, post, traffic, hospital, school, etc. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
